title: anthemis tinctoria subsp. subtinctoria
intro: Anthemis tinctoria subsp. subtinctoria, also known as the small chamomile or low chamomile, is a subspecies of the chamomile plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, particularly in soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation, due to its high content of apigenin and other flavonoids. The health benefits of Anthemis tinctoria subsp. subtinctoria include relieving menstrual cramps, improving sleep quality, and reducing anxiety, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
